translation_findings.issue: zh adds parenthetical gloss '（for循环结束）' that has no counterpart in jp or en; harmless enrichment but mildly inconsistent.
translation_findings.suggested_fix: endfor   (drop the parenthetical to match jp/en exactly), or add the same gloss to en.

narrative: Section title 'Programming 2: Selection and Iteration' clean; for-loop table accurately translated. One LOW polish nit: zh adds gloss to 'endfor' row not present in jp/en. Non-blocking.
